ops.note: Fixed in 88e4dd0803e9 (released v0.27.0): shipRefuseEmptyJJ refuses an empty jj working copy pre-commit with `ship: nothing to commit — did a prior ship already land <sha> "<subject>"?` plus a validated-target push hint; no-diff merges (parents>1) stay committable, conflict-inherited empty children refuse. Proven by TestShipJJEmptyRefuses (fake lane), TestShipJJPreflightRefusalAndEmptyGuardLive beat 3 (real jj), and a live scratch double-run: second ship exits 1 with the message, remote count unchanged.
